meta_title: For Freelancers: design with AI to Solve can't debug code (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to design with AI and overcome can't debug code. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Design with AI to Solve Debugging Issues
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with broken code. Learn how to design with AI using Antigravity and Claude Code to ship faster, debug instantly, and impress your clients.
content.answer_block: When debugging stalls your momentum, shift from manual syntax hunting to AI-driven architectural design. By using Antigravity to map logic and Claude Code to implement and verify fixes, you transform complex bugs into resolved features. This workflow allows you to ship production-ready code while maintaining high-velocity freelancer output.
content.intro:
The screen is glowing, the deadline is six hours away, and you’re staring at a cryptic stack trace that makes zero sense. You’ve been chasing a ghost in the codebase for three hours, and your client is waiting for an update that isn't coming. The frustration of being stuck isn't just a technical hurdle; it’s a direct threat to your freelance reputation and your bottom line.

But what if you stopped fighting the code and started designing the solution? By leveraging AI as your architectural partner, you bypass the manual drudgery of line-by-line debugging. This guide provides the blueprint to move from 'stuck' to 'shipped' by integrating Antigravity for structural design and Claude Code for rapid execution.

steps.title: Map the Logic Architecture
steps.description: Before touching code, visualize the data flow to identify where the logic breaks. Antigravity helps you model the system state.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current file structure and generate a Mermaid diagram of the data flow for the authentication module, highlighting potential failure points.

steps.title: Isolate the Failure Point
steps.description: Use Claude Code to scan logs and identify the exact line of failure without manually sifting through thousands of lines.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Based on the error log provided, identify the root cause in the state transition logic.

steps.title: Draft the Fix via Design
steps.description: Don't just patch the bug; design a more robust implementation that prevents recurrence.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Propose a refactored pattern for the state manager that uses immutability to prevent the current race condition.

steps.title: Automate Verification Tests
steps.description: Ensure the fix doesn't break existing features by generating regression tests.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a suite of unit tests for the new state manager logic that covers edge cases for concurrent user sessions.

steps.title: Final Deployment Sync
steps.description: Push the verified code and document the change for your client's records automatically.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a concise technical summary of the bug fix and the architectural improvement for the client changelog.
steps.claude_code_command: claude commit -m 'fix: resolve race condition in state manager via architectural refactor'

pro_tips: Always define your 'Success State' in the Antigravity prompt before asking for code; it forces the model to work backward from a working solution.
Use Claude Code's memory feature to store your client's specific coding style guides so every fix feels native to the existing codebase.
When a bug is stubborn, ask the AI to 'explain the code to a junior developer'—the simplification often reveals the hidden logical flaw.
Prioritize 'Test-Driven Debugging': write the test that fails first, then let the AI write the code to pass it.
Keep a 'Context File' in your root directory summarizing your project's architecture; Claude Code will reference this to prevent breaking changes.
content.next_steps: After completing these steps, audit your project for technical debt and begin implementing an automated CI/CD pipeline using the same AI workflow.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting bugs dictate your schedule and start shipping with the confidence of a lead engineer. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
